heading: Availability of data and congressional briefings
label: 9204 Availability of data and congressional briefings

children.label: A
children.text: the memorandum of agreement and memorandum of understanding described in paragraphs (1) and (2), respectively;

children.label: B
children.text: any successor memoranda of agreement or understanding to the memorandum of agreement and memorandum of understanding described in paragraphs (1) and (2), respectively;

children.label: C
children.text: any similar joint agreement or understanding between the Department of Agriculture and the Department of Homeland Security, or other relevant agencies, that documents the biodefense mission of the National Bio and Agro-Defense Facility; and

children.label: D
children.text: research, including a description of the users of the National Bio and Agro-Defense Facility.

children.heading: Termination
children.label: b Termination
children.text: The reporting and briefing requirements under subsection (a) shall terminate on the date that is 5 years after the date on which the National Bio and Agro-Defense Facility attains full operating capability.
